title: Subliminal Brand Symbol Geology Landscape Photo AI
sourceTitle: Subliminal Brand Symbol Geology Landscape Photo AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Photorealistic subliminal advertising landscape where Apple logo silhouette with a separate leaf shape is secretly formed by snowy mountain range with cliffs, mist, and bright sunlit ridges as a second-look optical illusion. Subject: Apple logo silhouette with a separate leaf shape must be recognizable only through real physical geography, using specific formation rule variant with readable visual details instead of any digital overlay or perfect vector shape. Scene: snowy mountain range with cliffs, mist, and bright sunlit ridges stretches vast and majestic across the frame with dramatic clouds, rolling mist, crepuscular god rays, and cinematic terrain contrast. Composition: Wide aerial drone shot in a 1:1 square frame: the main body of the symbol appears through a deep curved valley cutting the apple body into the mountainside, while specific floating element variant with readable visual details can appear as a suspended island of rock and earth when the symbol requires a disconnected piece. Signature Elements: Preserved subliminal brand symbol geology landscape photo source structure, fixed composition hierarchy, stable visual rhythm, and reusable content controls remain consistent across generated variants. Style: Authentic National Geographic aerial photography aesthetic, photorealistic geology, subtle surrealism, cinematic mood, organic jagged terrain edges, and pareidolia-based brand recognition. Color Palette: Natural landscape colors shaped by the chosen environment, high-contrast dark valleys, bright snow or sunlit highlights, storm-cloud grays, mist whites, and restrained cinematic saturation. Lighting: Sun partially hidden behind clouds or floating landmass, backlighting the terrain with god rays, deep shadowed valleys, bright rim highlights, and moody atmospheric contrast. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Photorealistic subliminal advertising landscape where Nike swoosh hidden across a desert dune landscape is secretly formed by vast sand dunes under storm clouds and low golden light as a second-look optical illusion. Subject: Nike swoosh hidden across a desert dune landscape must be recognizable only through real physical geography, using specific formation rule variant with readable visual details instead of any digital overlay or perfect vector shape. Scene: vast sand dunes under storm clouds and low golden light stretches vast and majestic across the frame with dramatic clouds, rolling mist, crepuscular god rays, and cinematic terrain contrast. Composition: Wide aerial drone shot in a 1:1 square frame: the main body of the symbol appears through a long crescent-shaped shadow valley sweeping through the dunes, while specific floating element variant with readable visual details can appear as a suspended island of rock and earth when the symbol requires a disconnected piece. Signature Elements: Preserved subliminal brand symbol geology landscape photo source structure, fixed composition hierarchy, stable visual rhythm, and reusable content controls remain consistent across generated variants. Style: Authentic National Geographic aerial photography aesthetic, photorealistic geology, subtle surrealism, cinematic mood, organic jagged terrain edges, and pareidolia-based brand recognition. Color Palette: Natural landscape colors shaped by the chosen environment, high-contrast dark valleys, bright snow or sunlit highlights, storm-cloud grays, mist whites, and restrained cinematic saturation. Lighting: Sun partially hidden behind clouds or floating landmass, backlighting the terrain with god rays, deep shadowed valleys, bright rim highlights, and moody atmospheric contrast. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.
